title: Plan for Neighbourhoods
body: "The Plan for Neighbourhoods programme reforms and expands on the previous administrations Long-Term Plan for Towns programme.   The Plan for Neighbourhoods programme was renamed Pride in Place Programme on 25 September 2025. The guidance for the 75 previously announced Plan for Neighbourhoods locations will be updated to reflect the renaming of the programme. Boards should continue to prepare to submit their Regeneration Plans by 28 November 2025. ​  Please see Pride in Place Programme FAQ for further information.  "
